Incident: Internal switch is04.sr01.sao04 is down. As of 21:45 UTC 30 November 2025, Network Specialists are investigating an internal switch that services provision servers in SAO04 Datacenter. Customer may experience delays in provisions while Networking and Datacenter staff work on restoring the internal switch.
Symptom: Internal switch is04.sr01.sao04 has gone down.

Incident: Internal network switch is04.sr01.sao04 is down. Impacted Env(s): Sao Paulo (br-sao) REGION Cause Code: is-vpc pod failures packet loss
Symptom: coredns pod is experiencing an issue on the control node. The pod may be running, but the node may not.

Fix: IaaS Core (NRE) worked with DCOPS to replace the faulty switch. All stalled transactions (test) moved on after manual restart.
